challenges.title: Found Money
challenges.question: You find ₹10 on the playground. What's the honest choice?

options.text: Ask friends if they lost it

feedback.correct: Excellent! Giving found money to a teacher is the honest choice!
feedback.wrong: Remember, found money should be returned to its owner or given to a trusted adult!

challenges.title: Extra Change
challenges.question: You're given extra change at a shop. What do you do?

options.text: Keep it as a gift from the shopkeeper

feedback.correct: Perfect! Returning extra change shows honesty and integrity!
feedback.wrong: Returning extra change is the honest thing to do, even if it's tempting to keep it!

challenges.title: Lending Money
challenges.question: Your friend asks to borrow ₹5. What's a fair deal?

feedback.correct: Amazing! Clear agreements about repayment help maintain friendships!
feedback.wrong: When lending money, it's important to have clear agreements to maintain trust!

challenges.title: Broken Toy
challenges.question: You break a toy worth ₹20. What's honest?

options.text: Tell your parents and offer to pay

feedback.correct: Great! Taking responsibility shows maturity and honesty!
feedback.wrong: Taking responsibility for damage is the honest way to handle the situation!

challenges.title: Honesty Value
challenges.question: Why does honesty with money matter?

feedback.correct: Wonderful! Honesty builds trust and respect, which are invaluable!
feedback.wrong: Honesty with money builds trust and respect, which are more valuable than any amount of money!
